title: Washing money shame clean
subtitle: A five-minute visualisation for releasing the weight of past financial decisions.
excerpt: A five-minute visualisation for releasing money shame. A single image: warm water washing over the hands, carrying away the weight of past financial decisions. The image runs for three minutes after a brief settling. Use when old guilt around money is active and tapping hasn't been enough to shift it.
sourceNotes: Water-as-cleansing imagery is a public-domain visualisation lineage across both folk-healing and modern therapeutic traditions. The money-shame application is adapted from Day 5 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Release shame about past mistakes."

practice.whenToUse: Use when guilt or shame around a past money decision is active and feels heavy in the body — when tapping has lightened it but not fully cleared it.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for releasing money shame. One central image: warm water flowing over the hands, carrying away the weight of old financial decisions. The image holds for three minutes after a short settling. Use it when guilt around past money decisions feels heavy in the body — after tapping, or as a standalone practice.
Sit or stand somewhere quiet. Rest the hands palm-up on the thighs or loosely in your lap. Close the eyes. Three slow breaths.

Picture the hands in front of you. Notice that they are carrying something — not a visible weight, but a heaviness. The old money decision. The year things went wrong. The regret. Notice where in the hands it sits. Palm, or the back of the hand, or the fingers.

Now picture warm water beginning to flow over the hands. Not cold water — warm, the temperature of a comfortable bath. The water flows over the backs of the hands first, then over the palms. It is clear water. It lifts the heaviness as it moves.

Watch the water carry the weight away. Not scrubbing it off, just carrying it — the way a current moves things downstream. The hands under the water begin to feel lighter. The warmth is the kindness the old decision didn't receive at the time. Let the water run for two slow minutes. Let the hands lighten.

Let the water slow and stop. The hands are dry, lighter. Hold the image of clean, empty hands for thirty seconds. Then open the eyes. Notice the real hands in your lap — the weight that was in the image is allowed to stay in the image.
If the shame is too loud for the image to settle, tap first.
clears the charge before the visualisation. For a ceremonial release rather than a visualisation,
gives the specific decision a physical release.

Water-as-cleansing imagery is a public-domain lineage across folk-healing and modern therapeutic traditions. The money-shame application is adapted from Day 5 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), where releasing the weight of past financial decisions is the day's focus.
